'''Trarr''' was a [[Gados]] [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] maker near the [[Old Patch]] in [[Abregado-rae Spaceport]] on the planet [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]] in the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. This Gados was talented at forgery and was often hired by the [[Tundei]] regime as a spy. His skin had turned yellow with age, but he was still flexible and capable of the same physical feats as in his youth. <ref name="CatCW" />

{{Char-stub}}
